final:
module sram_16bit (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] storage [0:15]; // 16 storage cells of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            storage[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to storage
        end else begin
            data_out <= storage[addr]; // Read data from storage
        end
    end
endmodule
